# رَفّي / Raffy

رَفّي (Raffy) is a bilingual Arabic and English personal library organizer created by Abdullah Mansour.

## What Raffy Does

- Organizes personal books, covers, authors, categories, shelves, acquisition dates, ratings, and notes.
- Works as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on mobile and desktop.
- Supports offline book management and syncs edits when the device reconnects.
- Supports JSON import and export for portable backups.
- Uses email and password authentication with separated user data.

- English about: https://raffy-library.vercel.app/en/about

- English creator profile: https://raffy-library.vercel.app/en/creator

- English use cases: https://raffy-library.vercel.app/en/use-cases
- Arabic contact: https://raffy-library.vercel.app/contact
- English contact: https://raffy-library.vercel.app/en/contact

## Creator

Abdullah Mansour (عبد الله منصور), also known online as aim9sour, is an Egyptian Applied AI Engineer, accessibility-focused maker, open-source contributor, and creator of Raffy and Hassila.

He previously worked in digital marketing, then shifted into applied artificial intelligence. He has helped and mentored more than 1,000 people toward online work and digital opportunities, contributed to open-source projects on GitHub, and holds recognized certificates from Google, IBM, Microsoft, Amazon and others in digital marketing and artificial intelligence.

Contact and identity:

- GitHub: https://github.com/aim9sour
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/aim9sour/
- Email: abdullahmansour.marketing@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +201006859116

English: Raffy, personal library organizer, book organizer app, home library software, offline library app, PWA book tracker, book notes app, Abdullah Mansour, Applied AI Engineer, aim9sour.
